title: Requirement
description: A single requirement entry in the waterfall lifecycle requirements set. Covers functional, AI, NFR, constraint, and assumption categories.

id.description: Unique requirement identifier in format REQ-YYYY-NNN (e.g. REQ-2026-001)

description.description: Full requirement description — must be unambiguous and testable

category.description: Requirement category: functional (system behaviour), ai (ML-specific), nfr (non-functional), constraint (fixed limit), assumption (condition believed true)

priority.description: MoSCoW priority: must (mandatory), should (important), could (desirable), wont (out of scope)

id.description: Unique acceptance criterion ID in format AC-YYYY-NNN

test_ref.description: Reference to the test case ID — TBD until Phase 4

acceptance_criteria.description: One or more acceptance criteria for this requirement

upstream.description: Source artefact or business objective this requirement derives from

downstream.description: Design elements, components, or test cases derived from this requirement

owner.description: Person or role responsible for this requirement

phase.description: Phase in which this requirement was identified (typically 2)
